title: Helping at a charity shop
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: Every Saturday morning, I help at a charity shop near my house. The shop sells clothes, books and toys which have been donated (27) local people. My job is to put items on the shelves and answer customers’ questions. At first, I was shy, but now I feel more confident (28) customers ask me questions. Some customers come in looking (29) cheap books, while others want clothes for special occasions. Last week, an elderly woman told me that she had found exactly what she needed. She was so pleased that she thanked everyone in the shop. Working there is different (30) other activities I do at the weekend because it feels useful. I have also learned a lot (31) teamwork. I think volunteering is a good way (32) help other people.

questions.explanation: Passive agent: donated by local people.
